Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 17 July 2026

1. Who We Are

BME Recruitment Group is a construction recruitment agency specialising in mechanical and electrical (M&E) temporary labour supply. Our contact details are:

  • Business name: BME Recruitment Group
  • Address: Leeds, West Yorkshire, UK
  • Phone: 0113 733 6301
  • Email: via our contact form on the homepage

2. What Information We Collect

When you use our client enquiry form, we collect:

  • Company name and contact name
  • Phone number and email address
  • Trades required, number of operatives, and project location
  • Your message and any additional details

When you upload your CV through our candidate registration iframe, your CV and contact details are submitted directly to BME Recruitment Group's CRM system.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your information solely to:

  • Respond to client enquiries and supply labour to construction projects
  • Register candidates and match them with suitable temporary work opportunities
  • Communicate with you about recruitment services and opportunities

4. How We Store Your Information

Your information is stored securely through Project Forward's CRM system and BME Recruitment Group's candidate CRM. We do not sell your data to third parties. We only keep your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.

5. Third-Party Services

Our client enquiry form is processed through Project Forward's secure API. Our candidate CV upload is handled by BME Recruitment Group's CRM partner via an embedded iframe. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics, or advertising services on this website.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request a copy of the information we hold about you
  • Ask us to correct or delete your information
  • Object to how we use your information

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details above.

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

← Back to home

Specialist M&E recruitment agency supplying skilled mechanical and electrical operatives to construction projects across the UK.
